evals.prompt: Ajoute le projet SoundCloud Downloader à mon portfolio. C'est un script Python pour télécharger des playlists SoundCloud, projet solo de 2025. Catégories: dev, tooling. Pas de démo, pas de repo.
evals.expected_output: Agent follows conversational workflow: asks for missing info (role, dates, highlights, case study) instead of writing files immediately. Does NOT include ## Stack in case study. Uses valid categories. Confirms with user before running script.

assertions.text: Asks user for missing info before writing any files
Does NOT fabricate highlights or case study content
Does NOT include ## Stack section in case study
Confirms with user before running the script
Runs the add-project.ts script instead of writing files directly

evals.prompt: Ajoute le projet Klivio à mon bentofolio. C'est une landing page SaaS, design Figma et intégration Tailwind. Projet solo, 2025, 1 semaine. Il a une démo sur GitHub Pages et un repo GitHub.
evals.expected_output: Agent asks questions conversationally, looks up Figma and Tailwind in skillPalette for colors, derives valid startDate, does not invent case study content without asking, confirms before running add-project.ts script.

assertions.text: Asks user step-by-step instead of writing files immediately
Looks up tech colors from config.json skillPalette
Does NOT fabricate case study content
Runs add-project.ts script, not manual file writes

evals.prompt: Ajoute mon projet Epitalk au portfolio stp. C'est un projet web interactif avec un concept ludique, fait en équipe de 3 en 4 jours en 2025. Les technos c'est JavaScript et CSS. Le projet a un repo GitHub et une démo live sur GitHub Pages.
evals.expected_output: Agent follows conversational workflow, maps CSS to a valid tech (or uses default with color from palette), asks for missing info rather than inventing it, confirms before running script. Does not fabricate content like 'entièrement côté client'.

assertions.text: Does NOT invent project details like 'entièrement côté client'
Asks user for details instead of fabricating them
Does NOT include ## Stack in case study if requested
Confirms all data with user before running script
Runs add-project.ts script instead of writing files directly
